post_to_award_hours.name: Post→Award (hours)
post_to_award_hours.definition: Median time from load posting to awarded status in the load lifecycle. Aligned with Loadboard execution metrics.
post_to_award_hours.source: Loadboard or Transport Management System (TMS) stream

eta_accuracy_pct.name: ETA Accuracy (%)
eta_accuracy_pct.definition: Share of trips with actual arrival within SLA window vs planned ETA. Used in Carrier Operations for on-time performance.

co2_intensity_kg_per_mi.name: CO₂ Intensity (kg/mi)
co2_intensity_kg_per_mi.definition: Trip-level emissions per mile averaged across active routes. Aligned with Emissions & Sustainability and Rating (emissions category) domains.

risk_alerts_7d.name: Risk Alerts (7 days)
risk_alerts_7d.definition: Count of intelligence risk alerts generated in the last 7 days. Aligned with Intelligence domain location risk and multi-domain scoring.
